items.title: Pistons two-way forward Isaac Jones had zero college or JUCO offers after graduating high school. So he got a job working the loading dock at Puget Sound Pipe & Supply.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
Pistons two-way forward Isaac Jones had zero college or JUCO offers after graduating high school. So he got a job working the loading dock at Puget Sound Pipe & Supply.

"I always mess around and say I’m the only NBA player who's forklift-certified."

www.freep.com/story/sports...

media.title: How Isaac Jones went from forklift operator to Pistons G League standout
media.description: Before Isaac Jones ever dunked a basketball, he learned how to operate a forklift. Now he's a standout on the Pistons' G League squad.

items.title: Isaac Jones denies Phoenix Suns with swat
items.author: ESPN
items.body_excerpt: Isaac Jones denies Phoenix Suns with swat ESPN

items.title: Henley's had two nice possessions. Hit the Donovan Mitchell step-through and dumped off to Isaac Jones for two points at the line. Just went behind-the-back to his left and finished with his right. He's stood out in a game that's otherwise been pretty bad.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt: Henley's had two nice possessions. Hit the Donovan Mitchell step-through and dumped off to Isaac Jones for two points at the line. Just went behind-the-back to his left and finished with his right. He's stood out in a game that's otherwise been pretty bad.

media.title: Summer League roster built to give Okorie keys to Pistons offense
media.description: Ebuka Okorie is going to get plenty of chances to show the ability to run his team’s offense when the Pistons get to Las Vegas for Summer League.
